active.notes: Policy packs (MFA, password, posture, session) evaluated via engine; evidence stored as JSONL with optional mirror; compliance snapshot script summarizes per control; API route available for dev testing.

active.title: DO sweepers and cron
active.notes: Durable Object sweep/replay/rollup helpers with cron toggles, admin endpoints, and Miniflare-style tests. Artifacts under artifacts/cron.

active.title: CI workflows + artifacts
active.notes: CI workflow runs npm install + npm run ci:run to produce build/test logs and SBOM; security workflow handles lint and secret scan.

active.title: Artifact helper and discipline
active.notes: Centralized writeArtifact helper wired through compliance, adapter smoke, and trace scripts with tests and refreshed artifacts.

active.title: Observability trace hooks
active.notes: Tracing helper emits JSON logs with request IDs and wraps worker fetch; unit tests assert header propagation and log shape; smoke script writes artifacts/obs/trace-smoke.log; docs/OBSERVABILITY.md added.

active.title: Evidence locker
active.notes: Evidence locker persists blobs to R2 with sha256 keys and optionally mirrors to S3; contract covered by unit tests.

active.title: IdP interface & fallback mocks
active.notes: Defined IdP adapter contract, provided mock adapters (Okta, Entra, Google, AWS, Paycom, CrowdStrike) and dev fallback OIDC provider with contract tests.

active.title: JML Engine Demo flows
active.notes: Joiner/Mover/Leaver flows restored; tests and artifacts staged

active.title: AI adapter generator
active.notes: Generator v1 + simulator verified. Registry updated. Tests green. Artifacts captured. Feature-flag gated connectors API working.

active.title: Research engine deterministic JSON
active.notes: Artifacts generated under artifacts/research for Example HR Suite, Slack Provisioning, Google Workspace. Research normalizer and generator integration verified.

active.title: Docs alignment
active.notes: Ready to push (docs updated; changes staged)
active.scope: Align documentation across Project-AtlasIT and AWhittleWandering repos (structure, links, and PR body).
artifacts: artifacts/docs/RUN.json  # run metadata for docs sync

active.title: Hybrid AWS Support Docs
active.notes: Hybrid AWS backplane guide is actionable (OIDC trust, scoped IAM, Terraform skeleton, zsh runbook, rollback). No runtime code changes.

active.title: AWS backplane Terraform skeleton
active.notes: Terraform skeleton for dev backplane (EventBridge bus, S3 evidence mirror with lifecycle, DynamoDB TTL table, IAM role trust for OIDC, basic log group). No backend configured; use remote backend in env-specific wrapper.

active.title: IdP Core + Mock Okta + Minimal Routes
active.notes: IdP registry/types, deterministic mock Okta adapter with fixtures, flag-gated routes /api/idp/list and /api/idp/provision (FEATURE_IDP_OKTA), tiny simulator emitting junit.xml; dev-only, flags default OFF.

active.title: Deploy AtlasIT to Cloudflare (dev)
active.notes: Dev deploy to Worker with KV/D1/R2/DO bindings; cron disabled in dev; AWS backplane toggled off by default.
